message:
perf(diary): scan workspace logs for faster diary lookup

When finding diary by session path, check all workspace logs (not just
global) to avoid full diary directory scans. Falls back gracefully if
logs don't contain the session.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
